description:
Log in as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Configure the Moodle site's front page identity and global navigation menu. Set the Full site name to 'Springfield Technical College LMS', the Short name to 'STC Moodle', and the Front page summary to 'Welcome to the official learning platform for Springfield Technical College.' Update the theme's custom menu items with the following structure:

Library|http://library.example.edu
Student Services
-Help Desk|http://help.example.edu
-Calendar|http://calendar.example.edu

metadata.expected_summary_part: Welcome to the official learning platform for Springfield Technical College
